item.ridetraining.riding_upgrade.tooltip: Gives a burst of riding training to a Pokémon.
Boosts Speed, Stamina, and Skill up to the Pokémon's natural riding limit.
Pushes a Pokémon's stamina beyond its natural riding limit.
Only works up to 2× the Pokémon's native stamina — use wisely!
item.ridetraining.training_reader.toolti: Right-click a Pokémon to check its riding stats and potential.
Hold while riding to see live training progress.
text.ridetraining.item.no_ride_support: This Pokémon cannot be ridden — no compatible riding style found.
text.ridetraining.stamina_berry.no_more: This Pokémon's stamina is already at its maximum.
text.ridetraining.upgrade.no_more: This Pokémon has already reached its riding limit from Upgrade Berries.
